title: evangelion store help
wikitext:
[]: evangelion store help             Quote Post by ShinjiWaterson » Mon Aug 27, 2012 3:47 pm I cannot read Japanese could someone help to register to the store I'd real like to buy from there

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 4:08 pm Do they even ship overseas? You may have to go through a deputy service to order from them.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Aug 27, 2012 4:19 pm AR-99 wrote: Do they even ship overseas? You may have to go through a deputy service to order from them.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 4:48 pm Even if you were to sign up you would have to pay import taxes,the country's tax, shipping and handling, and so on.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Aug 27, 2012 5:37 pm Bagheera wrote: You will also have to sign over your house and your firstborn, and probably sell your soul for good measure.

[]:             Quote Post by ShinjiWaterson » Tue Aug 28, 2012 9:17 pm there always is amazon jp

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Tue Aug 28, 2012 9:25 pm But you would still have to use Japanese billing information. I would recomend looking on amazon or ebay in your current country as they have many things you can get from Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Aug 28, 2012 9:35 pm Amazon Japan does not require Japanese billing info except for some specific items (video games is one example). I've ordered from them multiple times over the years and had no problems. Also most of their generic website pages and options are available in english.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Aug 28, 2012 9:40 pm Rj123541 wrote: But you would still have to use Japanese billing information. I would recomend looking on amazon or ebay in your current country as they have many things you can get from Japan.
